creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
The build in a clean poudriere environment fails like this:

/work/ipcs.post.build  |  /usr/bin/tail -n +2 | /usr/bin/sed -E 's/^s +([0-9]+).*$/\/usr\/bin\/ipcrm -s \1/' > /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/firebird25-client/work/ipcrm.sh
/bin/sh /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/firebird25-client/work/ipcrm.sh
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/firebird25-client/work/ipcrm.sh: s: not found
*** Error code 127

PS: There are a lot of warnings too. Have a look on this.
